dateTimeConverter.title: Date-time Converter
dateTimeConverter.description: Convert date and time into various different formats with enhanced functionality
dateTimeConverter.toastUpdated: Input updated with selected date and time
dateTimeConverter.toastSetCurrent: Input set to current date and time
dateTimeConverter.errorInvalid: Invalid date format. Please check your input.

integerBaseConverter.title: Integer Base Converter
integerBaseConverter.description: Convert a number between different bases (decimal, hexadecimal, binary, octal, base64, ...)
integerBaseConverter.errorEnter: Please enter a number to convert.
integerBaseConverter.errorInvalid: Invalid number for the selected base. Please check your input.

romanNumeralConverter.title: Roman Numeral Converter
romanNumeralConverter.description: Convert between Roman numerals and integers

base64StringEncoder.title: Base64 String Encoder/Decoder
base64StringEncoder.description: Simply encode and decode strings into their Base64 representation
base64StringEncoder.errorEncode: Failed to encode text. Please check your input.
base64StringEncoder.errorDecode: Invalid Base64 string. Please check your input.
base64StringEncoder.aboutText: Base64 is a binary-to-text encoding scheme that represents binary data in sequences of 24 bits that can be represented by four 6-bit Base64 digits. It's commonly used to encode data that needs to be stored and transferred over media designed for text.

colorConverter.title: Color Converter
colorConverter.description: Convert color between different formats (hex, rgb, hsl and css name)
colorConverter.errorInvalid: Invalid color format. Please enter a valid hex color.

textToNatoAlphabet.title: Text to NATO Alphabet
textToNatoAlphabet.description: Transform text into the NATO phonetic alphabet for oral transmission
textToNatoAlphabet.placeholderInput: Enter text to convert to NATO alphabet...

textToAsciiBinary.title: Text to ASCII Binary
textToAsciiBinary.description: Convert text to its ASCII binary representation and vice-versa
textToAsciiBinary.placeholderText: Enter text to convert to binary...
textToAsciiBinary.errorToBinary: Failed to convert text to binary
textToAsciiBinary.errorInvalidBinary: Invalid binary format. Please ensure binary is in 8-bit chunks.
textToAsciiBinary.tip1: Each character is converted to an 8-bit binary representation
textToAsciiBinary.tip2: Binary input should be in 8-bit chunks (spaces are optional)

textToUnicode.title: Text to Unicode
textToUnicode.description: Convert text to Unicode code points and back
textToUnicode.placeholderText: Enter text to convert to Unicode...
textToUnicode.errorToUnicode: Failed to convert text to Unicode
textToUnicode.errorInvalidUnicode: Invalid Unicode format. Use formats like U+0041, \u0041, A, or 0x41
textToUnicode.tip1: Supports multiple Unicode formats: U+, \u, &#x, and 0x
textToUnicode.tip2: Handles emoji and special characters correctly
textToUnicode.tip3: Automatically detects format when converting Unicode to text
